name: Toll-e Goloii (RH-114)
description: Late Middle Susiana settlement. Almost leveled by agriculture.

name: Toll-e Mentar (RH-115)
description: Possible old Elamite (Sukkalmah), and Achaemenid settlement (2,55 ha).

name: Tom-e Atashi (SOJAS-A19)
description: Early Chalcolithic settlement. circular enclosure of a village with no signs of solid architecture inside.

name: Tom-e-sorkh (OS-118)
description: Yahya VC-B, and Yahya VA cultures settlement.

name: Tom-i-Khaki (OS-051)
description: Yahya VA, and Iblis IV (Aliabad) cultures settlement.

name: Tompak-asar (Asar N°2)
description: Archeological site of an ancient city of the Dzhetyasar culture

name: Toprakhisar Höyük [Altınözü]
description: Setlement dates to 5000/4900-4400-4300 BC. Rescue excavation.

name: Toptepe (Tekirdag)
description: Chalcolithic, Bronze Age and Iron Age site.

name: Tōqelījīq (GWS-7)
description: Iron I, II, III, achaemenid and early sasanian settlement.

name: Torre dos Mouros
description: Settlement since Iron age to early medieval times

name: Traiectum, vicus (oostzijde)
description: Vicus behorend bij het castellum Domplein (Traiectum)

name: Trapeza
description: Neolithic - Bronze Age cave site near Tzermiado.

name: Trepcza
description: Ottomány culture fortified settlemnet. Celtic fortified  settlement.

name: Trepucó
description: Talayotic settlements on Minorca existed since Early Bronze Age till Medieval

name: Tres Tabernae
description: Way station on the Via Appia

name: Tughulghich Tappeh (NTS-340)
description: Achaemenid, parthian and medieval islamic settlement. Badly damaged by urbanisation, but still visible on CORONA imagery (1969).

name: Tuglu Höyük
description: Tuğlu Höyük. Tuglu Sub-District; west-southwest of Çorum Province.

name: Tujg (BALL 1200)
description: Mongol and Timurid settlement. Mud-brick ruins. Surveyed by Fischer (1974).

name: Tul-i Baba Mobarak (J6)
description: Late Sasanian and early medieval islamic settlement on a mound. Damaged by modern urban development.

name: Tul-i Cheghoseh (J11)
description: Area of ruins and foundations. No dating information. Heavily damaged by urban development.

name: Tülmen (Tilmen) Höyük
description: Middle Bronze Age settlement S to ozova-Urfa highway. Do not confuse it with Tilmen Höyük near Islahiye.

name: Tuloglu Tepe
description: EBA; MBA-LBA; Iron Age; Hellenistic-Roman Periods remains.

name: Tülüce Höyük
description: Hittite period settlement. Yuğ Höyük - Çorum

name: Tulūl al-Fāj
description: Two mounds from Parthian and Sassanian periods where Old Babylonian bricks have been found.

name: Tump-e-Qasimabad
description: Chalcolithic settlement. Surveyed by A. Stein. Approximate location.

name: Tump-i Marzeh (GH014)
description: Chalcolithic (4th mil. BC) and historical periods settlement.

name: Tump-i Mehta (PK13)
description: 3rd millennium BC, Iron Age, Sassanian and medieval Islamic settlement, in the Jaghin Plain.

name: Tump-i Namurdi
description: Probable pre-Islamic settlement. Probable extensions in western and southern directions. Surveyed by A. Stein.

name: Turkman Ayesh Tappeh (HUS-5)
description: Iron III & IV, achaemenid and medieval islamic settlement.

name: Turkman Tappeh (HUS-75)
description: Iron III & IV, and medieval islamic settlement.

name: Türkmen Karahöyük
description: Türkmenkarahüyük. Possibly the once Hittite capital, Tarhuntašša.

name: Turnhout-Tijl en Nelestraat
description: Tijdens het archeologisch onderzoek in 2009 van een selectie van 1.7 ha in het kader van de verkaveling van de percelen werden de sporen van een Romeinse landelijke nederzetting vastgesteld, die bewoond was vanaf de tweede helft van de eerste eeuw tot het

name: Tüse in Lycia
description: Site of ancient Lycian town near  Tüse.

name: Tuvurunaghe settlement
description: Nuraghe Tuvurunaghe also Tuvu nuraghe, Tuvuru nuraghe.

name: Tyberissos in Lycia
description: Remnants of the ancient Lycian city of Tyberissos.

name: Tymbrianassus
description: Düğer Köyü [Burdur Belediyesi] Greek Archaic and  Phrygien town.

name: Uch-tepe 10 (170)
description: Yaz I & II settlement (0,44 ha). Located through GPS coordinates.

name: Ujazd
description: Neolithic settlement of the Funnelbeaker culture.

name: Umm el-Jimal
description: Ruins of a Byzantine and early Islamic town

name: Umm Hewitat - Umm Hayatat
description: Ruins of a small settlement located off the Via Hadriana. Pottery remains date to 5th c A.D.

name: Umm is-Sneneh
description: Khirbet Umm Sananeh - Umm es - Sneineh.

name: Umma -Tell Jokha
description: Modern: Umm al-Aqarib - ancient Sumerian city
